title: Advisories, Warnings and Recalls – MedEffect Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Advisories and Recalls – MedEffect Canada
If you are currently suffering from an adverse reaction to drugs or health products, contact your health professional or local health authorities.
The Recalls and Safety Alerts Database provides easy access to a comprehensive list of recalls, advisories, and safety alerts. This database includes recalls from Health Canada, the Canadian Food Inspection Agency, and Transport Canada.
Notice about Health Canada advisories
- Subscribe to MedEffect e-Notice or MedEffect Canada RSS Feeds

## Additional Resources
- Contact the Marketed Health Products Directorate
